mainEntity.name: How do LA attorneys align PR with websites for Gemini AI citations?
mainEntity.text: How do LA attorneys align PR with websites for Gemini AI citations?

acceptedAnswer.text: Publish identical expertise claims in PR wires and site bios using same keywords/language. Reference LA Superior Court cases consistently for pattern recognition.

suggestedAnswer.text: Gemini favors cohesive signals: Same attorney quotes in Law360 PR and firm blog. Track citations via Gemini queries. Boosts recs 25%; misalignment confuses AI. Agencies handle for $3k/mo. Opponents monitor PR for case prep.

name: PR-Website Alignment for LA Gemini Visibility
